programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Two brothers have half of a powerful ancient Chinese talisman An evil gang leader has the other half and determines to get the brothers half and have a complete medallion so he can gain absolute power

programme.title: SpaceCamp
programme.desc: The young attendees of a space camp find themselves in space for real when their shuttle is accidentally launched into orbit

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The owner of a warehouse distributorship threatens to report Kimble to the police if he doesnt stay away from his sister He has no interest in her but when she kidnaps a small boy he must choose between saving the boy or himself

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is suspected of insurance fraud after an impostor steals a valuable necklace

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is invited to join a longtime friend and her workaholic husband on their expedition to explore an Aztec ceremonial pool on an uninhabited island located 15 miles off the coast of Mexico Mikes friend unwittingly puts her husbands life in jeopardy when she deliberately strands the trio on the island

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A Lt friend who grew up feeling overshadowed by Col Gallagher does everything from air stunts to disobeying orders to outshine him

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Much to Julias chagrin Sarah shows Dr Woodard the secret room Meanwhile Victoria tells Burke that not obtaining her dream home is a sign that they should postpone their marriage

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dr Woodard gradually discovers Barnabass secret and ultimately confronts him Meanwhile Roger makes plans to send David to military school

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas and Julia are each perplexed by Dr Woodards investigation into Barnabass affairs Meanwhile Elizabeth offers to reopen the west wing of the family mansion for Victoria and Burke to live in

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dr Woodard breaks into Julias room and steals her notes on the treatment of Barnabas Meanwhile Roger has a conniption fit over Elizabeths decision to let Burke and Vicki live in the west wing of the family mansion

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Fredy 119
programme.desc: Fredy 119

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan suspects a news anchor of murder but the man has a solid alibi that makes it nearly impossible to prove he is the culprit

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are dubious when Luke gets a part-time job as a shoe salesman but when he loses the job the rest of the McCoys unknowingly come to his aid by going to the store en masse to buy shoes

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the McCoys learn that hometown girl Glory is a Hollywood celebrity Luke fears Kate will be dissatisfied with her life when the McCoys visit her so when Glory comes to visit the McCoy men try to paint Kates life rosier than it is

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve something from a member of the Russian womens swim team but cant remember her name

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS uses Hymie as a robotic assassin against the Chief

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Lt Steiger set a match to a powder-keg when they abduct BJs best friend Bear BJ and the lady truckers wage war against SCAT just when Grant is trying to woo appropriations funding from an influential state senator

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13 but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Combat Photographer is assigned to the 73 to get some footage of the Crew in action Gruber borrows his movie camera to use in a money-making scheme Then when complications develop McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to avoid trouble for both themselves and the Photographer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys scheme to get rid of a troublesome new member of the 73 Crew and in the process wind up in big trouble But the new Crewman - Who happens to be the spitting-image of Binghamton - Turns out to be quite useful in a complicated plan to get them off the hook

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zoor

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane resurrects his wife Tatania only to learn the woman hes kept frozen all these years is Kitty Lane an exotic dancer and impostor placed in Arcanes lab by General Sunderland Sunderland has been holding the real Tatania captive

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane uploads the memory of his former teacher directly into his own In an ironic twist of justice Carl Mirador was schizophrenic and is now driving Arcane insane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Moonbase Alpha is attacked and devastated by warships from a nearby planet With half of its population dead Alpha can no longer survive Commander Koenig and Dr Russel go to the alien world to plead for the survivors but the inhabitants wish no one to disturb their serene existence

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young 322
programme.desc: Young 322

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A field worker tries to get a job in San Francisco and he does but moments later there is a raid by the immigration service and officer is killed

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The teams latest mission has them trying to root out a network of spies who were brought in by an American photographer The problem is the code that he and his handlers communicate with is unbreakable So they devise a plan to get him to reveal the method of decoding his communications And their plan has him asking for Cinnamon to pose for him During their photo shoot she displays knowledge of bio chemistry which the photographer decides to exploit

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a deck hand on a charter boat a company believes the skipper left the country after embezzling cash and securities The police decide to use an agent as the boats replacement skipper since the next passenger is the embezzlers wife who intends to meet up with him in Mexico The police also decide to investigate the mysterious deckhand since he has no background

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is driving a herd of horses across land he thought was open range The owner Martin Storm roughs him up and steals them He gets help from a local rancher who has been trying to rid the valley of this menace since he got there

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM has a drilling vehicle called The Magma Mole that they are using to burrow beneath Tokyo to create devastating floods

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: After Matt Trakkers sailing ship catches fire unexpectedly MASK decides to investigate a soon to be opened amusement park on a Greek island

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: When the lost city of Kongoland arises after 1000 years the N-Team goes to investigate When they arrive an ancient treasure possesses Princess Lana with the spirit of Konga the leader of the Konkas

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation
